title: Resolution Adopting the Technical Report on the Risk Exposure Maps on the Municipality of Los Baños, Province of Laguna (POPULATION, BUILT-UP AREAS, AND ROADS EXPOSED TO RAIN-INDUCED LANDSLIDE AND FLOODING) Prepared by the Mines and Geosciences Bureau Under Its Vulnerability and Risk Assessment Project. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 07/13/2020)
